def test_join_room(client, auth_header, staff_auth_header): # Create a room (needs STAFF) create_resp = client.post("/rooms/", json={"name": "Joinable Room"}, headers=staff_auth_header) room_id = create_resp.json()["id"]
# Join it (owner automatically joins usually, so maybe test with a second user?) # For simplicity, verifying endpoint exists and handles logic > response = client.post(f"/rooms/{room_id}/join", headers=auth_header) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
